CREATE TABLE user_keys (key_name VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY);
CREATE TABLE user_info (user_id INT, key_name VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY (key_name) REFERENCES user_keys(key_name));
SELECT xenc_key_exists((SELECT key_name FROM user_info WHERE user_id = 1));
SELECT xenc_key_exists((SELECT key_name FROM user_info WHERE user_id = 3));
SELECT xenc_key_exists((SELECT DISTINCT key_name FROM user_info));
SELECT xenc_key_exists((SELECT key_name FROM user_info WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM user_info WHERE user_id <> 1)));
